{"query":"Scottie Scheffler 2026 Nicklaus Award fourth consecutive year announcement PGA Tour","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2335,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.pgatour.com/article/news/latest/2024/01/03/scottie-scheffler-wins-jack-nicklaus-award-as-pga-tour-player-of-the-year-for-second-consecutive-season-eric-cole-rookie-of-the-year","title":"Scottie Scheffler wins Jack Nicklaus Award as PGA TOUR Player of the Year for second consecutive season","content":"Scheffler is the first player to win Player of the Year honors in back-to-back seasons since Tiger Woods won the award in three straight years from 2005-07.
Scheffler won twice during the 2022-23 season, successfully defending his title at the WM Phoenix Open and winning THE PLAYERS Championship by five strokes.
His total of six top-five finishes during the 2022-23 season was tied for the fifth-most of any player and trailed only Scheffler (13), Patrick Cantlay(8), McIlroy (8) and Rahm (8), all of whom currently rank among the top five players in the Official World Golf Ranking."},{"url":"https://www.thememorialtournament.com/media/news/world-no-1-scottie-scheffler-to-go-for-three-wins-in-a-row-at-the-memorial-tournament-presented-by-workday/","title":"World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler to go for three wins in a row at the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday » the Memorial Tournament","content":"Celebrating its 50th anniversary this year, the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday is June 1-7 at Jack Nicklaus’ world-renowned Muirfield Village Golf Club.
He was also named the Jack Nicklaus Award winner as the PGA TOUR Player of the Year for a fourth consecutive season.
He received the Byron Nelson Award for recording the lowest scoring average (68.13) for the third consecutive season, and led the TOUR in SG: Total, SG: Approach the Green, SG: Tee to Green and the Official Money list with over $27.6 million.
Fleetwood followed 2010 Memorial winner Justin Rose (2018) as the second Englishman to win the FedExCup.
Woodland, 41, earned an emotional fifth career PGA TOUR victory last month at the Texas Children’s Houston Open."},{"url":"https://www.pgatour.com/article/news/latest/2026/01/08/scottie-scheffler-to-make-2026-season-debut-at-the-american-express-pete-dye-stadium-course-la-quinta-country-club","title":"World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler to make 2026 season debut at The American Express - PGA TOUR","content":"Reigning four-time PGA TOUR Player of the Year Scottie Scheffler will make his 2026 season debut at The American Express later this month.
The American Express is a traditional stop on Scheffler’s annual schedule, with the world No.
He won the Procore Championship and played the Ryder Cup in September, then added a T4 at the Hero World Challenge in December.
Other recent notable commitments to the event include Justin Rose, Sam Burns, Patrick Cantlay, Ben Griffin, Robert MacIntyre and Max Homa."},{"url":"https://www.golfchannel.com/watch/golf-channel-podcast/scottie-scheffler-wins-fourth-straight-pga-tour-player-of-the-year","title":"Scottie Scheffler wins fourth straight PGA Tour Player of the Year - Golf Channel","content":"Rex Hoggard and Ryan Lavner discuss Scottie Scheffler winning his fourth straight PGA Tour Player of the Year award and whether any golfer can have a better year than the four-time major champion.
Open Championship 2026: Round 1 late highlights"},{"url":"https://www.espn.com/golf/story/_/id/47314770/scottie-scheffler-wins-fourth-straight-pga-tour-player-year-award","title":"Scottie Scheffler wins fourth straight PGA Tour Player of Year award - ESPN","content":"PGA Tour members who competed in at least 15 tournaments were eligible to vote on the award from Dec.
After cutting his hand in a holiday cooking accident in December 2024, Scheffler missed the first month of the 2025 season.
Then on July 20, Scheffler completed the third leg of the career Grand Slam by finishing four strokes ahead of the field in the Open Championship at Royal Portrush Golf Club in Northern Ireland.
Open to become the seventh golfer to complete the career Grand Slam.
Scheffler has won 19 times on tour since the start of the 2022 season and has earned about $99.5 million in on-course prize money during his career.
FedEx Cup champion Tommy Fleetwood, Masters champion Rory McIlroy and three-time winner Ben Griffin were also nominated for the Jack Nicklaus Award.
Ranked 81st in the Official World Golf Ranking, Potgieter led the tour in driving distance (325 yards) and was eighth in strokes gained: off tee (.572)."}]}
